message:
fix(sync/pool): release state lock before acquiring return_wakers to preserve lock ordering

The state lock guard was held while acquiring return_wakers, and the
waiter ID was extracted after the state lock was dropped — a window for
stale reads. This reorders the operations so the waiter ID is extracted
while state is still held, then state is dropped before touching
return_wakers, preserving the documented lock ordering invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
